title: GEBCO Global Bathymetry Grid — Red Sea Extent
abstract: Annual releases (2019-2025) of the GEBCO global terrain model, a continuous elevation/bathymetry grid at 15 arc-second resolution, clipped to the Red Sea and Gulf of Aden extent. Includes both the elevation grid and the Type Identifier (TID) grid documenting the source/quality of each cell.

variables.name: elevation
variables.label: Elevation/Depth
variables.description: Combined land elevation and ocean depth (negative below sea level) on a continuous global grid.

variables.name: tid
variables.label: Type Identifier
variables.description: Documents the source data type underlying each grid cell (e.g. direct survey, satellite-derived, interpolated).

steward.name: GEBCO Compilation Group (mirrored internally by KAUST)

access.how_to_request: Publicly downloadable from https://www.gebco.net/data_and_products/gridded_bathymetry_data/; this is a Red-Sea-clipped internal mirror.

provenance.license: GEBCO terms of use — free for any use with attribution (see GEBCO_Grid_terms_of_use.pdf in the source folder)
provenance.citation: GEBCO Compilation Group. GEBCO Grid. General Bathymetric Chart of the Oceans.

known_issues: DOI not recorded per-release — GEBCO issues a distinct DOI for each annual grid, not captured here.
